secureDescription: All complaint files are protected with layered verification and audit logs.

login.heroTitle: One command center for every complaint, case, and closing argument.
login.heroSubtitle: Sign in with your role to reach the tools built for it — intake for IOs, oversight for SHOs, and documentation for Legal Advisors.
login.subtitle: Choose your role and enter your credentials.
login.footer: Access is role-restricted. Contact your administrator if you believe you should have access to a different area.
login.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.errorConnection: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
